lessons.lesson: .agent/ directory is the agent brain — must be created before any other operation. All files follow strict schemas defined in AGENTS.md.
lessons.action: Always create .agent/ files with correct schemas on first session

known_patterns.cause: .agent/ directory is not committed to version control (contains session state)
known_patterns.fix: Auto-create .agent/ files from AGENTS.md schema on first run

padauk-gemma:q8_0.notes: Primary EN→MM model. 98%+ Myanmar ratio. Best results with temp=0.2, repeat_penalty=1.15.

alibayram/hunyuan:7b.notes: CN→EN pivot Stage 1 model. Good Chinese comprehension.

qwen:7b.notes: Fast checker model. Produces English not Myanmar — do NOT use as translator. Only suitable for validation tasks.

qwen2.5:14b.notes: Good Chinese comprehension but outputs Japanese/Chinese instead of Myanmar. Use only for CN→EN pivot, not for Myanmar output.

burmese-gpt:7b.notes: Registered GGUF model via Modelfile.burmese-gpt. Not yet production tested.
